summary: Comprehensive testing of The Gig Pulse PWA completed. All requested features working correctly. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (18/18 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with proper navigation, content loading, and admin features.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint (/api/health)
Backend: YouTube feed API returns videos with correct structure
Backend: Featured channels API returns 3 channels
Backend: Hide video API (POST /api/youtube/hide/{video_id}) works correctly
Backend: Hidden videos list API works correctly
Backend: Static content APIs (gig-apps, helpful-tools, featured-gear, weekly-shows, community-favorites)
Backend: News feed API returns articles
Backend: Suggestions APIs (channel, gear, app) accept submissions
Frontend: Home page loads with navigation cards (Curated Videos, News Feed, Driver Essentials, Apps & Tools)
Frontend: Content page shows Featured Channels (Rideshare Rodeo, The Rideshare Guy, Rideshare Professor)
Frontend: Content page shows Latest Videos with YouTube thumbnails
Frontend: Admin mode toggle - tap 'Latest Videos' 5 times enables admin mode with '(Admin)' text
Frontend: Admin mode shows red X button on video cards for hiding
Frontend: Essentials page shows 3 Featured Gear items with images and prices
Frontend: Essentials page shows Community Favorites with product images
Frontend: Apps page shows 10 Gig Apps in grid (Uber, Uber Eats, Lyft, DoorDash, Grubhub, Instacart, Spark, Amazon Flex, Shipt, Roadie)
Frontend: Apps page shows 6 Helpful Tools (Gridwise, Everlance, WorkSolo, GigU, Mystro, Maxymo)
Frontend: Admin panel login with password 'mrn320' works correctly
Frontend: Admin panel shows Apps, Gear, Channels, News, Emails tabs with pending suggestions
Frontend: News Feed page shows Weekly Shows (Drivers Coast 2 Coast, Show Me The Money, Off The Clock)
Frontend: News Feed page shows Latest News articles with categories
Frontend: Bottom navigation works (Content, News Feed, Essentials, Apps, Merch)
seed_data_creation: Test suggestions created during API testing (TEST_Channel_*, TEST_Gear_*, TEST_App_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Admin mode toggle requires 5 taps on 'Latest Videos' text within 2 seconds. Admin panel password is 'mrn320'. YouTube API is live and returning real videos. PWA install prompt may appear and can be dismissed.
